scripts.bench: bun run build:release && cargo build --release --manifest-path old/native/Cargo.toml && bun bench/run.js
scripts.bench:http-native:static: bun run build:release && bun bench/run.js http-native static 3001
scripts.bench:old:static: cargo build --release --manifest-path old/native/Cargo.toml && bun bench/run.js old static 3002
scripts.bench:http-native:dynamic: bun run build:release && bun bench/run.js http-native dynamic 3011
scripts.bench:old:dynamic: cargo build --release --manifest-path old/native/Cargo.toml && bun bench/run.js old dynamic 3012
scripts.bench:http-native:opt: bun run build:release && bun bench/run.js http-native opt 3021
scripts.bench:old:opt: cargo build --release --manifest-path old/native/Cargo.toml && bun bench/run.js old opt 3022
